posts.text: ⚡️US EIA has released its Q1/2026 Domestic #Uranium Production Report📄🛢️☢️🇺🇸 showing US mined U supply down slightly in Q1 vs Q4/2025 to just over 1 Million lbs #U3O8🛝 just 2% of US #Nuclear reactor annual fuel requirements of ~50 Million lbs🤏🤯🤠🐂#UraniumSqueeze🗜️🌊🏄 https://www.eia.gov/uranium/production/quarterly/
posts.author: quakes99
